Backend contract

Uses the live endpoints from `/api/v1`, including medicine warnings and lab test search.

Quick routes

Safety checkerDisease suggestions

Warnings

Prescription safety check

Select a candidate generic, add current medications, and inspect risk results.

POST /medicines/check-warnings

Prescription warning checker

Build a candidate prescription and check warnings before prescribing.

Select one or more currently used medicines to check interactions.

No warning report yet

Run a warning check to see contraindications, interactions, and pregnancy or lactation risk.
